question: Will CPI rise more than 0.9% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has already been released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics on April 10, 2026. The official data shows CPI increased by 0.3% in March 2026, which is significantly below the 0.9% threshold required for the market to resolve YES. Since the actual increase was only 0.3%, this market should definitively resolve to NO.
key_factors: Official BLS data released showing 0.3% CPI increase
Market closes April 10, same day as data release
risks: None - official data already released and confirmed
